raw.subject: Your Campton page caught my eye, MindSoulTouch
raw.body:
Hi,

Your page caught my eye, especially the post about Nikki enjoying her massage with you at Viaggio Spa. It sounds like she had a wonderful experience.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new clients like Nikki to find and reach out to you directly.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea that brings together some of the great content you share on Facebook. It includes a services overview, a photo gallery, a contact section, and even a map and hours section so people can easily find your location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/mindsoultouch-campton

This would be a straightforward project to build out from here, with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you'd like to discuss further, feel free to reply or give me a quick call.
